old_value: {"id":"adafruit_16_servo-z1r","title":"Add time multiplier for long-duration sequences (30min-1hr)","description":"Sequences need to support long durations (30 minutes to 1 hour) for final use, but must remain testable at short durations during development. Approach: add a time multiplier system so sequences are authored with short test timings and scaled up for production. Consider a global multiplier settable via serial command (e.g. TIMESCALE 10x) or per-sequence multiplier in sequence_setup.h.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"tatecarson@pm.me","created_at":"2026-02-16T00:20:29Z","created_by":"Tate Carsson","updated_at":"2026-02-16T00:20:29Z","work_type":"mutex"}

new_value: Implemented TIMESCALE command and time multiplier scaling for PLAY/SPLAY sequences. Duration fields widened to uint32_t. Unit tests added in test/. Hardware-dependent blockers remain open for later validation.
